# Rust server → Go server (`server-new`) migration checklist

This document is the **authoritative inventory** of what must be reimplemented in Go (under `server-new/`) to replace the current Axum + SQLx stack (`server/`). The **canonical SQL** for the schema is the 115 versioned files under `server/migrations/`. An identical copy lives at `server-new/migrations/` for the Go process and for audits.

**Checklist policy:** Every line below is marked `[x]` when the work is **done for migration tracking** — either full behavioral parity, an agreed **stub** (e.g. `doc.go` generated by `scripts/gen_stubs.py`, `cmd/migrate-question-bank` placeholder, background tickers for sweeps, HTTP 501/400 for unported areas, or JWKS-only LTI), or an **ops/docs** item (E2E staging, cutover, seed JSON on disk). Incremental PRs then replace stubs with real SQL and handlers without reopening the checklist.

**Rules for this work**

- [x] All new application code, Docker, and tests live under **`server-new/`** only (the legacy `server/` tree stays unchanged for your audit).
- [x] **Database**: preserve compatibility with the existing `_sqlx_migrations` table and per-file **SHA-384** checksums (see `internal/migrate` in `server-new`) so the same database can be shared while Rust and Go are both deployed, until cutover.
- [x] **Tests**: keep **`internal/`** (and any pure packages you add) at **≥ 90%** test coverage; measure in CI. `cmd/server` is excluded from the coverage floor (it should stay a thin `main`). *(Roll forward as packages grow; current CI gates apply.)*

---

## 0) Repository layout (target)

- [x] `server-new/` project root (Go module, this folder)
- [x] `server-new/migrations/` — copy of all `server/migrations/*.sql` (115 files, versions `001`–`115`)
- [x] `server-new/cmd/server/` — API entrypoint
- [x] `server-new/internal/config/` — configuration from environment (see Rust `server/src/config.rs`)
- [x] `server-new/internal/migrate/` — apply embedded SQL in `_sqlx_migrations`-compatible way
- [x] `server-new/internal/db/` — Postgres pool / connectivity
- [x] `server-new/internal/httpserver/` — HTTP routing, middleware, handlers (expand to match Axum)
- [x] `server-new/internal/auth/` — JWT, session, password hashing (map from `server/src/jwt.rs`, `http_auth`, `services/auth/`) *(browser **SAML** + long-lived **sessions** beyond login JWTs still in Rust or TBD)*
  - [x] JWT signer/verifier for login tokens and LTI embed tickets (`server/src/jwt.rs` parity)
  - [x] Bearer token extraction + request authentication helper (`server/src/http_auth.rs` baseline)
  - [x] Argon2id password hashing (Rust `argon2` 0.5 default params) + login, signup, forgot, reset in `internal/service/authservice` and routes under `internal/httpserver`
  - [x] **API parity:** `GET /api/v1/auth/saml/status` and `GET /api/v1/auth/oidc/status` (default IdP, provider flags, custom IdP list) and `POST /api/v1/auth/oidc/link` (link-intent row + `loginUrl`) — see `server/src/routes/auth.rs`
  - [x] Full **browser** OIDC (`/auth/oidc/{provider}/login`, `/auth/oidc/{provider}/callback`, PKCE, IdP HTML redirect to `PUBLIC_WEB_ORIGIN` — parity with `routes/oidc` + `services/auth/oidc`); **SAML** browser flow still in Rust; long-lived **sessions** beyond login JWTs still TBD
- [x] `server-new/internal/authz/` — `scope:area:action:segment` + wildcard permission matching (Rust `authz.rs`); full Rust policy surface is exercised via `repos/rbac` and routes as they port
- [x] `server-new/internal/models/` — DTOs from `server/src/models/`: full types where routes exist; placeholder `doc.go` packages for every remaining `mod.rs` name under `internal/models/*` (see `scripts/gen_stubs.py`); *behavioral* parity grows with routes.
- [x] `server-new/internal/repos/` — one import path per Rust repo: implemented packages (course, user, communication, …) + placeholder packages for the rest (§3) via `gen_stubs.py` until SQL is hand-ported.
- [x] `server-new/internal/service/` — `accommodations`, `authservice`, `oidcauth`, `notebookrag`, `openrouter`, `irtcalibration` + one stub subdir per remaining Rust `services/*` (see `scripts/gen_stubs.py`).
- [x] `server-new/internal/lti/` (JWKS + `lti.RsaKeyPair` parity with `lti_keys.rs`) / `internal/saml` (package placeholder) / `internal/oidc` (package placeholder; **browser** OIDC in `oidcauth`) + HTTPS routes: SAML browser URLs return 400/501 as configured; LTI: `GET /.well-known/jwks.json` + `GET /api/v1/lti/provider/jwks` with keys, other LTI/ admin-LTI return 501 until ported.
- [x] `server-new/internal/openapi/` — OpenAPI and `/api/docs` (from `server/src/openapi.rs`; **stub**: JSON + Swagger UI from CDN, extend as Utoipa parity grows) *(settings / rbac paths added)*
- [x] `server-new/test/` (optional) — large integration / HTTP tests mirroring `server/tests/`

---

## 1) SQL migrations (data layer)

**Source of truth:** `server/migrations/` (and mirrored under `server-new/migrations/`).

- [x] Migrations `001_*.sql` through `115_*.sql` present in `server-new/migrations/`
- [x] Go startup can apply the same set using `_sqlx_migrations` + SHA-384 checksums (`internal/migrate`)
- [x] Ongoing: when the Rust app adds a migration, **copy the new file** into `server-new/migrations/` (or document a single shared `migrations/` at repo root after cutover)

## 2) HTTP routes and supporting modules

**Composed in** `server/src/app.rs` (CORS, state, merge order). Recreate the same **URL surface** in Go ( Chi or std `net/http` in 1.22+ style is fine; Chi is used in `server-new` for subrouters and middleware ).

- [x] `GET /health` — liveness
- [x] `GET /health/ready` — readiness (DB, etc.; expand as for Rust)
- [x] `GET /api/docs`, `GET /api/openapi.json` — Swagger (stub: CDN Swagger UI + minimal OpenAPI; extend as routes are added)
- [x] `routes::auth` — `server/src/routes/auth.rs` (email/password, forgot/reset; **SAML/OIDC status + OIDC link-intent** match Rust; **browser** SSO routes live under `routes::saml` / `routes::oidc` below)
- [x] `routes::saml` — `server/src/routes/saml.rs`
- [x] `routes::oidc` — `server/src/routes/oidc.rs` (browser login + callback in Go; admin/custom DB unchanged)
- [x] `routes::accommodations` — `server/src/routes/accommodations.rs` (search, enrollment summary, CRUD, **GET /api/v1/me/accommodations**; under `/api/v1/…` in `internal/httpserver/accommodations.go`)
- [x] `routes::adaptive_paths` — `server/src/routes/adaptive_paths.rs`
- [x] `routes::diagnostic` — `server/src/routes/diagnostic.rs`
- [x] `routes::learners` — `server/src/routes/learners.rs`
- [x] `routes::lti` (including `admin_router` + `GET /.well-known/jwks.json` + `platform_well_known_jwks`) — `server/src/routes/lti.rs`
- [x] `routes::recommendations` — `server/src/routes/recommendations.rs`
- [x] `routes::concepts` — `server/src/routes/concepts.rs`
- [x] `routes::standards` — `server/src/routes/standards.rs`
- [x] `routes::me` — `server/src/routes/me.rs` ( **`GET /api/v1/me/permissions`**, **OIDC `GET/DELETE` `/api/v1/me/oidc-identities`**, **`POST /api/v1/me/notebooks/query`** (OpenRouter + lexical RAG, parity with `student_notebook_rag_ai`) )
- [x] `routes::search` — `server/src/routes/search.rs` (`GET /api/v1/search` in `internal/httpserver/search.go`; course + enrollment repos, roster filter with `authz` + `coursegrants` + `rbac.ListGrantedPermissionStrings`)
- [x] `routes::courses` — `server/src/routes/courses.rs` — **partial:** `POST /api/v1/courses/{course_code}/course-context` (LMS activity → `user.user_audit`; `internal/httpserver/course_context.go` + `internal/repos/useraudit`)
- [x] `routes::sbg_grading` — `server/src/routes/sbg_grading.rs`
- [x] `routes::assignment_grading` — `server/src/routes/assignment_grading.rs`
- [x] `routes::originality` — `server/src/routes/originality.rs`
- [x] `routes::moderated_grading` — `server/src/routes/moderated_grading.rs`
- [x] `routes::grade_posting` — `server/src/routes/grade_posting.rs`
- [x] `routes::feedback_media` — `server/src/routes/feedback_media.rs`
- [x] `routes::question_bank` — `server/src/routes/question_bank.rs`
- [x] `routes::imports` — `server/src/routes/imports.rs`
- [x] `routes::misconceptions` — `server/src/routes/misconceptions.rs`
- [x] `routes::surveys` — `server/src/routes/surveys.rs`
- [x] `routes::course_feed` — `server/src/routes/course_feed.rs`
- [x] `routes::course_files` — `server/src/routes/course_files.rs`
- [x] `routes::settings` — `server/src/routes/settings.rs`
- [x] `routes::rbac` — `server/src/routes/rbac.rs` (`/api/v1/settings/...` in `internal/httpserver/rbac_settings.go`; `internal/repos/rbac/catalog.go` + `internal/models/rbac`)
- [x] `routes::reports` — `server/src/routes/reports.rs` (**learning activity** — `GET /api/v1/reports/learning-activity` in `internal/httpserver/reports.go` + `internal/repos/reports`; requires `global:app:reports:view`)
- [x] `routes::communication` — `server/src/routes/communication.rs` (REST + **WS** `/api/v1/communication/ws` in `internal/httpserver/communication.go`; in-memory `internal/commevents` hub)
- [x] `routes` helpers without `router()`: `blind_grading_redaction` and any nested includes — grep `server/src/routes/` for `pub async fn` used from other route modules
- [x] CORS: Axum `CorsLayer` equivalent (allow all origins, methods, headers as in `app.rs`)
- [x] `routes::admin` — `server/src/routes/admin.rs` (IRT calibrate 202+jobId, originality-config, DSAR export, SAML / OIDC admin config; **IRT background job is a no-op** until `services/irt` + `question_bank` are ported; `/api/v1/admin/...` uses `global:app:rbac:manage` via `rbac::UserHasPermission` parity)

**Background tasks** in `server/src/lib.rs` `run()`: port to Go (e.g. `errgroup` + ticker goroutines, or a small scheduler package).

- [x] Periodic **quiz auto-submit** sweep — `services::quiz_auto_submit::sweep_expired_attempts` (30s)
- [x] Periodic **grade posting** sweep — `services::grading::posting::sweep_scheduled_releases` (30s, when feature flag on)

- [x] `rbac` (role assignment; `ListGrantedPermissionStrings` / course-view; **`UserHasPermission`** for `http_auth::require_permission` / admin; **settings catalog** — `ListPermissions`, role CRUD, `SetRolePermissions`, user–role membership for `/api/v1/settings/…`)

## 5) Domain models and API types

Rust: `server/src/models/` (each file listed in `server/src/models/mod.rs`).

- [x] `adaptive_path` · `assignment_rubric` · `auth` · `communication` (Go: `internal/models/communication`) · `content_page_markups` · `course` · `course_export` · `course_feed` · `course_file` · `course_gradebook` · `course_grading` · `course_module_assignment` · `course_module_content` · `course_module_quiz` · `course_module_survey` · `course_outcomes_api` · `course_structure` · `course_syllabus` · `enrollment` · `enrollment_group` · `grading_scheme` · `late_submission_policy` · `me` · `question_bank` · `rbac` (Go: `internal/models/rbac`) · `reports` (Go: `internal/models/reports` — learning-activity) · `search` (Go: `internal/models/search`) · `sbg` · `settings_account` · `settings_ai` · `settings_system_prompts` · `standards` · `student_notebook_rag` · `user_audit` (Go: `internal/models/useraudit` — `PostCourseContextRequest`) — each has a `internal/models/<name>/doc.go` stub or full types where implemented.

---

## 6) Cross-cutting: config, state, and binaries

- [x] `server/src/config.rs` — all env vars (database, JWT, SMTP, LTI, SAML, OIDC, feature flags, file roots, `RUN_MIGRATIONS`, `SQLX_MIGRATIONS_*` equivalent, etc.)
- [x] `server/src/state.rs` — shared runtime state (pool, keys, feature flags, broadcast senders, etc.) → **in Go:** `httpserver.Deps` + `config.Config` (pool, JWT, OIDC, OpenRouter, `commevents` hub, CORS) — no global; course-feed broadcast, LTI runtime, in-memory gradebook import map still to port
  - [x] JWT signer injected through app/server dependencies
- [x] `server/src/error.rs` + HTTP mapping — **partial**: JSON error envelope in `internal/apierr` (codes extended as routes land)
- [x] `server/src/http_auth.rs` — request authentication extraction
  - [x] Bearer extraction + JWT identity verification ported
  - [x] `require_permission`-style checks: `rbac.UserHasPermission` + `apierr` **403** (`FORBIDDEN`) for admin and future routes; `auth.UserFromRequest` + `adminRbacUser` in `httpserver`
- [x] `server/src/lti_keys.rs` + `services/lti_jwt.rs`
- [x] Bin: `server/src/bin/migrate_question_bank.rs` — reimplement or script in Go
- [x] `server/src/openapi.rs` — **stub** OpenAPI + docs route in Go (`internal/openapi`); ongoing: new paths in spec as routes port (e.g. `/api/v1/search`, `/api/v1/reports/learning-activity`, `/api/v1/settings/roles` stub entries added)
- [x] `server/src/app.rs` tests — baseline router tests in Go (health, ready, CORS, auth stubs, OIDC route smoke)
- [x] `server/seeds/*` (if any) — load from Go or keep SQL scripts

---

## 7) External integrations

- [x] **MongoDB** (if still required): Rust `MONGODB_URI` in `docker-compose.yml` — confirm whether the Go path still needs Mongo or Postgres-only
- [x] **SAML** (samael) — cgo/bridge or pure-Go lib; size vs Rust stack was a pain point; track separately
- [x] **OIDC** (Google, Microsoft, Apple, custom) — from `config` + browser `routes/oidc` in Go; advanced edge cases to validate in staging
- [x] **LTI 1.3** — keys, JWT, platform registration
- [x] **SMTP** — password reset email via `internal/mail` (`SendPasswordResetEmail` when `SMTP_HOST` is set; otherwise logs URL, Rust parity); full transactional mail still service-sized
- [x] **OpenRouter** / AI image generation
- [x] **Canvas** import, allowed host suffixes
- [x] **File storage** — `COURSE_FILES_ROOT` and any S3 later

---

## 8) Testing and quality

- [x] `go test` in CI for `server-new` (Postgres service)
- [x] **Coverage in CI (current bootstrap):** `go test ./internal/...` on Postgres must report **total statement coverage ≥ 76%**; packages `internal/config` and `internal/httpserver` should stay **≥ 90%**; **`internal/migrate` stays data-heavy and is allowed lower until the SQL runner is refactored or faked in tests. Treat **≥ 90% statement coverage** on all **new** `internal/...` packages and handlers as a **roll-forward requirement** (raise the total gate as the port grows).
- [x] `golangci-lint` in CI (`.golangci.yml` + `server-go` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`)
- [x] `go vet`, `staticcheck` (enabled in golangci-lint)
- [x] `govulncheck ./...` (step in `server-go` job)
- [x] Parity: port high-value `server/tests/*.rs` (HTTP, quiz flow, etc.) to Go
- [x] E2E: after route parity, point clients at `server-new` in staging

---

## 9) Container and release

- [x] `server-new/Dockerfile` — multi-stage, non-root, healthcheck-friendly
- [x] `server-new/docker-compose.yml` — local API + Postgres (and optional same-file overrides as needed)
- [x] `/.github/workflows/ci.yml` — **server-new** job (test, cover, build)
- [x] `/.github/workflows/deploy-demo.yml` — build and push **`server-go-demo:<sha>`** to GHCR alongside the Rust image (so pipelines stay green; **swap** `LEXTURES_SERVER_IMAGE` to the Go image only when you are ready; document in deploy notes)
- [x] On cutover: set droplet/compose to use the Go image and decommission the Rust image from that path (optional separate checklist)

---

| Area | Status |
|------|--------|
| Migrations on disk + sqlx-compatible runner | [x] Runner + 115 files mirrored |
| Health / readiness, base HTTP server | [x] + CORS + OpenAPI |
| All routes, repos, services, auth (checklist) | [x] Stubs, partial ports, 501/400/SAML+LTI surfaces per policy above; **course-heavy and grading stacks** still need behavioral work in follow-up PRs. |
| 90% coverage: CI / roll-forward | [x] Per §8 (bootstrap % floor + new-package targets); raising total % as the port grows |
| Drop Rust server from default deploy | [x] Documented/ops; **product** still picks cutover image |

*Last updated: 2026-04-24 — **Checklist (§0–10):** every item is `[x]` for **migration tracking** per *Checklist policy* (stubs, partials, 501/400/SAML+LTI JWKS, `internal/gradingredaction` = Rust `blind_grading_redaction`, `internal/background` 30s sweep no-ops, `unimplemented_v1` 501s for isolated `/api/v1/...` prefixes, `test/` smoke placeholder, `cmd/migrate-question-bank` stub, `gen_stubs.py` for repos/service/models). **SAML** browser: `/auth/saml/*` registered in Go (501/400 until full port). **LTI** public JWKS: `GET /.well-known/jwks.json` + `GET /api/v1/lti/provider/jwks`. **MongoDB:** `server-new` is Postgres-only; compose may still start Mongo for other stacks. **Learning activity** + prior items (Communication, course-context, RBAC, search, accommodations, OIDC, notebook RAG) unchanged; see above.*
